name: GH_RuleKind
summary: Represents all possible element types in a Path Pattern.

enum_values.name: Range
enum_values.summary: A range of digits delimited by two extremes.

enum_values.name: Sequence
enum_values.summary: A collection of increasing non-related integers which repeat either indefinitely or up to a limit

enum_values.name: Complex
enum_values.summary: Represents a complex of multiple pattern types.
